name: us500_m15_trend_pullback_ema
hypothesis: US500 M15 exhibits persistent intraday trend; pullbacks to EMA(20) within an uptrend (EMA20 > EMA50, ADX > 20) during RTH offer asymmetric long continuation; symmetric for shorts.

entry_rules.long: ema(20) > ema(50) AND adx(14) > 20 AND low <= ema(20) AND close > ema(20) AND rsi(14) between 40 and 65 AND session == us_rth
entry_rules.short: ema(20) < ema(50) AND adx(14) > 20 AND high >= ema(20) AND close < ema(20) AND rsi(14) between 35 and 60 AND session == us_rth

exit_rules.sl: 1.5 * ATR(14) from entry (below swing low / above swing high)
exit_rules.time_stop: close after 20 bars (~5h) or at RTH close

regime_filter.rule: adx(14) > 20 AND atr_percentile(14,500) >= 30; only trade when trend regime confirmed
